testcase.name: test_signature_analysis_field_in_response

failure.message: AssertionError: signature_analysis field not found in response assert 'signature_analysis' in {'confidence_score': 0, 'discrepancies': [{'description': 'Analysis failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.0652470000000003, Max budget: 1.0', 'location': 'AI Analysis', 'recommendation': 'Review document manually', 'severity': 'high', ...}], 'key_information': {}, 'recommendations': ['Retry analysis or conduct manual review'], ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_signature_detection_and_notary.py:150: in test_signature_analysis_field_in_response assert "signature_analysis" in analysis, "signature_analysis field not found in response" E AssertionError: signature_analysis field not found in response E assert 'signature_analysis' in {'confidence_score': 0, 'discrepancies': [{'description': 'Analysis failed: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 1.0652470000000003, Max budget: 1.0', 'location': 'AI Analysis', 'recommendation': 'Review document manually', 'severity': 'high', ...}], 'key_information': {}, 'recommendations': ['Retry analysis or conduct manual review'], ...}
